creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 229702
emulators/qemu-guest-agent: update to fix zombie processes

This applies the following upstream commit to fix an issue with zombie processes:

https://github.com/aborche/qemu-guest-agent/commit/71edc56b1476bf6c45d1d461bbfa9fe987a8974e
"Fix zombie process in guest-get-fsinfo"

I've bumped PORTREVISION to trigger an update for existing users.
